description:
Goal
Redesign fact/job read APIs so reads and lookups accept borrowed `FactKey` values and only durable read/wait/output sets own keys.

Scope
- compiler2 job helpers such as `read_fact`
- work-graph / fact-query call sites that clone keys to read or test settledness
- root and semantic jobs where clone-driven fact traffic is concentrated

Contract
- read/check APIs take `&FactKey`
- ownership is introduced only when a key is stored durably in `reads`, `waits`, `outputs`, or follow-up structures
- helper code that existed only to appease owned read APIs is removed

Validation
- targeted clippy sweep for redundant clone
- compiler2 semantic/root tests
- full `cargo test --workspace` before close
title: Make FactKey reads borrow-first
